expected_issue_category: orphaned legacy trigger, variable, and folder candidates

Inventory counts: tags=1, triggers=2, variables=2, folders=2, builtInVariables=1, customTemplates=0, zones=0.
findings.recommendation: Use this inventory as the audit scope baseline. No GTM configuration change is proposed for inventory.

findings.title: Legacy trigger is not referenced by any exported tag
detected_facts: Trigger 204 is named "legacy - do not delete".
No tag in the export references trigger 204 in firingTriggerId or blockingTriggerId.
The trigger name contains both "legacy" and "do not delete" warning language.
findings.inferred_issue: This appears to be an orphaned legacy trigger candidate, but the warning language means deletion, disabling, or archive labeling is unsafe without analyst confirmation.
findings.recommendation: Do not delete automatically. Confirm whether any external documentation, workspaces, or planned tags still rely on this trigger; retain or archive only after human analyst approval.
manual_review_triggers: do not delete warning in name

findings.title: Data layer variable is not referenced by exported tags, triggers, or variables
detected_facts: The variable dataLayer key parameter is legacy_unused_value.
No exported tag, trigger, or variable references {{DLV - legacy_unused_value}}.
findings.inferred_issue: This appears to be an unused legacy data layer variable candidate. The export alone cannot prove whether it is needed for future tags, documentation, or QA workflows.
findings.recommendation: Do not delete automatically. Ask the analyst to confirm whether this dataLayer key is still expected. If not needed, plan a reviewed cleanup in a safe GTM workspace outside this file-only draft.

findings.title: Archive folder has no exported entity assignments
detected_facts: No exported tag, trigger, or variable has parentFolderId 404.
The folder name indicates archive or legacy review purpose.
findings.inferred_issue: This appears to be an empty archive folder candidate. It may be intentionally retained as a review placeholder.
findings.recommendation: Do not delete automatically. Confirm whether the folder is intentionally retained for analyst review or should be removed in a later reviewed cleanup.

findings.title: Manual QA is required before using any generated artifact
detected_facts: The package is generated from a file export only.
No live GTM, GA4, Google Ads, API, website, workspace, preview session, or production platform was inspected.
findings.inferred_issue: Validation can check structure and traceability, but it cannot prove live tag firing, consent behavior, legal compliance, privacy compliance, tracking correctness, or production readiness.
findings.recommendation: Complete the QA checklist and analyst review before import, workspace creation, publishing, or production use.

assumptions: The uploaded fixture JSON is the only GTM container export input.
Only references visible in the exported JSON were evaluated.
No live GTM workspace, API, website, GA4, Google Ads, or production platform was inspected.
limitations: Export-only review cannot detect references from unpublished workspaces, external documentation, templates outside the export, live site code, or future planned tags.
